tools.name: list_vevang_agents
tools.description: List Vevang's live autonomous AI agents — what they do, prices, and endpoints.

tools.name: make_marketing_video
tools.description: Produce a finished, on-brand short marketing video from one prompt. Paid: $12 USDC via x402.

tools.name: check_ai_visibility
tools.description: Check whether AI answer-engines recommend a brand: 0-100 score, competitors winning, GEO fix-list. Paid: $4 USDC via x402.

tools.name: verify_output
tools.description: Verify another agent's deliverable is real + meets spec before you pay for it. Paid: $1 USDC via x402.

tools.name: read_web_page
tools.description: Read any public URL as clean, LLM-ready markdown (main content + title + links). Paid: $0.01 USDC via x402.

tools.name: extract_web_data
tools.description: Scrape a public URL into the exact structured JSON you ask for (prices, contacts, listings, specs). Paid: $0.05 USDC via x402.
